title: CobbleTowns
description: A datapack that will add naturally generated towns based on previous Pokémon games to Minecraft. Requires the Cobblemon mod for Forge or Fabric.
body:
# CobbleTowns

CobbleTowns is a datapack that adds randomly generated minecraft villages based on towns from the Pokémon franchise. The towns consists of houses, roads, villagers and decor, as well as some custom functional structures like Pokécenters and Pokémarts (this is a continuation of one of my previous datapacks, PokéBuildings).

![Pallet Town with Oak's Laboratory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb10669ae3acca86e603e96c659353e53d58507a.png)

Currently, the following seven towns and cities are available in the pack:

* Pallet Town and Lavender Town from the Kanto region.
* Cherrygrove City from the Johto region.
* Pacifidlog Town from the Hoenn region.
* Twinleaf Town and Floaroma Town from the Sinnoh region.
* Lentimas Town from the Unova region.

The pack is compatible with the Terralith mod, and towns will spawn in certain Terralith biomes, if installed. 

The pack also adds random Pokécenters and Pokémarts spawning around the world, outside of cities.


### Installation:
Just add the zip-file to the datapack-folder in your world to install. It should work for both singleplayer worlds and servers.

To enable custom Pokémon spawns in some of the structures, commands needs to be enabled on your server or singleplayer world.

The Cobble Folk skin pack (resource pack) is completely optional, and will make certain villagers appear as characters from the Pokémon series, like Nurse Joy and Professor Oak. The pack requires Optifine to work, as it uses custom models.


### The way forward:
I’ll keep developing this pack with more content and features. At this time, I have focused mostly on smaller towns, but I will add larger cities with gym compatability as soon as trainer battles are introduced in the Cobblemon mod.

As a side note, I’m back from a long hiatus, and will begin work on completely revamp my LegendaryStructures and PokéNests packs (that I unfortunately left to rot, sorry!). I have found a new method for spawning Pokémon that will hopefully fix most problems with these packs, as well as enables Pokémon to respawn, and I will of course update them to the latest versions of Cobblemon. I’ll keep you posted!

Please let me know of any bugs or glitches with the pack. And please back up your world before installing, just in case.

![Lavender Town and the Pokémon Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/295217cbf85f85eb8f65364e7092098331bef206.png)
